name: hospital-management-services-v2
description: Hospital Management System - Clean Architecture Services V2

scripts.dev: echo Use dev:local or dev:docker instead
scripts.kill:ports: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object {$_.LocalPort -in (3000,3001,3002,3003,3004,3006,3011,3025,3101)} | ForEach-Object {Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue}; Write-Host 'Ports cleaned up'"
scripts.dev:local: concurrently --kill-others --names "GATEWAY,IDENTITY,PATIENT,STAFF,APPT,NOTIFY,BILLING" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgYellow.bold,bgCyan.bold,bgWhite.bold,bgRed.bold" "cd api-gateway && npm run dev" "cd identity-service && npm run dev" "cd patient-registry-service && npm run dev" "cd provider-staff-service && npm run dev" "cd appointments-service && npm run dev" "cd notifications-service && npm run dev" "cd billing-service && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:local:core: concurrently --kill-others --names "IDENTITY,PATIENT,STAFF" -c "bgMagenta.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgYellow.bold" "cd identity-service && npm run dev" "cd patient-registry-service && npm run dev" "cd provider-staff-service && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:local:all: npm run kill:ports && concurrently --kill-others --names "GATEWAY,IDENTITY,PATIENT,STAFF,APPT,NOTIFY,BILLING" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgYellow.bold,bgCyan.bold,bgWhite.bold,bgRed.bold" "cd api-gateway && npm run dev" "cd identity-service && npm run dev" "cd patient-registry-service && npm run dev" "cd provider-staff-service && npm run dev" "cd appointments-service && npm run dev" "cd notifications-service && npm run dev" "cd billing-service && npm run dev"
scripts.env:status: echo Checking current environment... && if exist .env (type .env | findstr NODE_ENV) else echo No .env file found
scripts.build:all: npm run build:identity && npm run build:patient && npm run build:provider && npm run build:appointments && npm run build:billing && npm run build:notifications && npm run build:gateway
scripts.test:all: npm run test:identity && npm run test:patient && npm run test:provider && npm run test:appointments && npm run test:billing && npm run test:notifications
scripts.install:all: npm run install:identity && npm run install:patient && npm run install:provider && npm run install:appointments && npm run install:billing && npm run install:notifications

author: Hospital Management Team
